author: martinamalberti
body:
#### PR description:
This PR introduces a first implementation of the BTL electronics readout mapping infrastructure for the BTL detector. It supersedes https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50918.

Two new objects are added in `CondFormats/MTDObjects`

- [BTLElectronicsId](https://github.com/martinamalberti/cmssw/blob/mm_BTLMappingCondFormat_20260622/CondFormats/MTDObjects/interface/BTLElectronicsId.h): encodes the full electronics address of a BTL readout channel (FED/Slink, HS-link, e-link, TOFHIR channel, see [1]) packed into a single `uint32_t`

- [BTLReadoutMap](https://github.com/martinamalberti/cmssw/blob/mm_BTLMappingCondFormat_20260622/CondFormats/MTDObjects/interface/BTLReadoutMap.h) : the conditions payload providing a bidirectional mapping between `BTLDetId` (detector geometry) and `BTLElectronicsId` (readout electronics). The forward map (`BTLDetId`  `BTLElectronicsIdPair`) is serialized; the reverse map (`BTLElectronicsId`  `BTLDetId`) is transient and rebuilt at initialization. Each crystal has two readout channels, represented by [BTLElectronicsIdPair](https://github.com/martinamalberti/cmssw/blob/mm_BTLMappingCondFormat_20260622/CondFormats/MTDObjects/interface/BTLReadoutMap.h#L14-L16).

The map is currently populated by [BTLReadoutMapESProducer](https://github.com/martinamalberti/cmssw/blob/mm_BTLMappingCondFormat_20260622/EventFilter/MTDRawToDigi/plugins/BTLReadoutMapESProducer.cc), which makes the map available via the EventSetup.
The S-link identifiers (which will eventually correspond to FED IDs) are currently assigned temporarily in the [011] range as placeholders and will be updated once the official FED IDs are defined. 
This work is a prerequisite to start the development of the BTL packer/unpacker. 
A testing script has also been added in [CondFormats/MTDObjects/test](https://github.com/martinamalberti/cmssw/tree/mm_BTLMappingCondFormat_20260622/EventFilter/MTDRawToDigi/test) to verify the mapping and validate the behaviour of all implemented functions.

[1] slide 5 of https://indico.cern.ch/event/1484764/contributions/6257318/attachments/2983853/5254667/MTD_DAQ_PCD_CMS_WEEK.pdf

#### PR validation:
The code compiles successfully and was tested withCondFormats/MTDObjects/test/testBTLReadoutMap.py,to validate the mapping and verify that the implemented functions work as expected.

title: [MTD]: BTL readout mapping - first implementation in CondFormats
